reviews.review_title: The tactical shooter I been waiting for
reviews.review_description:
This game is janky. I one time got stuck on the wall. There is a weird sound that comes on I think randomly. Like some alarm. AI can be hit or miss but I keep dying so it’s not too bad.

But I love the level design . So many creative ways to tackle a building. The sledge hammer is actually useful. Lot of walls can be broken.

And main thing I love is an AI companion to control. Now this game is like the OG game Rainbow Six or OG Ghost Recon. 

The developer is also cool and very responsive. Only dude making it.

So many games want you to play with another person. I don’t want to play with people. I want to play on my own time and my own schedule. 

This game is exactly what I wanted from Tactical Assault and Split Second.

reviews.review_title: first and foremost a tactical shooter
reviews.review_description:
Not gonna lie, the graphics are sometimes a bit janky and there are some bugs here and there (you can tell its an indie game) but after i got used to the controls I was locked in. It's first and foremost a tactical shooter so it's not about speedrunning to kill 1000 enemies in 5 seconds, so be warned if that's what you're looking for, this isn't it! You gotta sneak around, watch the enemy to see what they are doing, plan your next move, then make your move when the time is right. The enemy AI is intelligent unlike a lot of other shooters, which is refreshing (I'm honestly tired of stupid AI who just run at you blind and whoever can fire the most shots wins). Gun mechanics are nice, you can't just empty a clip, you gotta take each shot carefully!

I agree with other reviewers that a sidearm would be a nice addition!

A good game but tactical assault vr did
come out since. 
And now it is just an ok game….
Good effort however.
Thank you.  

The NPC AI poses problem.
I love your approach. Slow game stealth .
Bless you for that. Really. I tried my best to play and stick to it but it felt unsteady.
Was left wondering if my level was done or not. Might be theAI. Do mot know. 
Will try your game again because i love your philosophy 
Thank you.

developer_response.body: You’re right, and I should explain that better. The tutorial doesn’t cover things like how many enemies a noise can attract, which enemies will hold position, or how the AI decides to search, because it’s already too long. Those systems exist and go deeper than what you see early on, but right now they’re not communicated clearly enough, which can make the game feel unstable. I’m working on more creative ways to teach these mechanics during play instead of dumping them upfront. I really appreciate you giving it another shot, And if you’re open to it, I’d genuinely value more feedback on the Discord, since that’s where most of the design iteration is happening.

reviews.review_title: Can’t go past the advanced tactics
reviews.review_description:
Got to the rappel part then the other door would not open I’ve tried blowing it up using the sledgehammer tried shooting it tried using the teammates but nothing Dk if it’s just a glitch but if anyone knows how to help with this or if I’m missing something 
It would be appreciated 
Thanks

developer_response.body: Hi, Is the issue resolved? If so please reconsider the rating as it has big effects, Thanks.

reviews.review_description:
This game could be a 5 star game. 
But there’s some game breaking bugs. 
Like having bad guy’s pop up at random . 
And sometimes the gun shoots for no reason. Also reloading could feel better.
And when try to  connect the clip the rope doesn’t show: most of the time. So that I can repeal down buildings.

developer_response.body:
Appreciate you pointing this out, Enemy popping I’m aware of and working on aide other developments, but the gun firing by itself and the rappel rope not showing? That’s the first I’m hearing of it, so your feedback is gold.

I’m building this solo, and sometimes bugs only show up for certain setups — if you’re down to help me track it down, I’d love to have you in the Discord:
https://discord.gg/7a5QEhuvFz

Would be awesome to fix it with you and maybe even earn that 5-star in the process 👊

reviews.review_description: Tutorial aspect is good, got to the end of tutorial and wasn’t super impressed, compared to other similar games. No sidearm, vest keeps moving around like it’s connected to the head and not the body, and the hook/rope could be smoother, hard to tell where the rope starts, and hard to grab the hook as the vest moves too much.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the thoughtful review. 
I’m a solo dev building TF9 as a stealth-first experience, so things like the missing sidearm are by design. That said, I’m actively working on improving the vest and rope feel based on feedback like yours.

If you’re up for shaping the next update or just want to share ideas, I’d love to have you in the Discord: https://discord.gg/7a5QEhuvFz

Hope I can earn that 5 stars next time, your input really helps.

reviews.review_description: This is a great game, but it doesn’t have any form of side arms from what I’ve played so could you please add a pistol a Glock 19 or Beretta would be nice also, can you please add gun customization.￼￼

developer_response.body:
Really appreciate you taking the time to write this — it’s exactly the kind of feedback that helps TF9 keep evolving. The core of the game is built around a single-player stealth experience, but you're not the first to ask about sidearms. Let’s just say… you might be onto something 😉

I’m deep in a redesign phase right now, and ideas like yours are shaping where it goes next. Thanks for being part of the journey — can’t wait for you to show what’s coming.

reviews.review_description: I had a problem with the game. I joined their discord server and they fixed the problem for me.

You can tell this is made by a small company.  But it needs more exposure so I’m gonna give it five stars.  The reasons for this:

Actual stealth mechanics 
AI teammate for great solo players who want tactical shooter
Not quick paced like zero caliber, actual tactical. 
The controls are intuitive.  

Although the game is fairly clunky, the AI enemies are not stupid like contractors and not a fast paced shooter like zero caliber.  It’s more like tactical VR but you don’t need to be online to play tactically and ALOT more intuitive controls compared to Tactical VR.

This game is so good but I think it would be so much better if they added a pistol for when you run out of ammo for the M4
 but I would definitely recommend this game
Nice. Looking. Game.  But. Needs. Work  ,A few. Glitch.   On first. Level   Could not. Open. Door. To. Finish. Game. ,  game. Need. Work. !

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback.
Do you mean the tutorial or the city?
In the tutorial, the door opens after you shoot all of the targets, as does the last elevator in the city level.

reviews.review_description:
For an early access game made by a solo developer it is pretty sweet. Task Force 9 is a single player game where you are a member of a special task force to bring down terrorist. You will also have the aid of an AI fire team partner you can strategical move through the game. This is not a run and gun game, you will have to move in silence and use strategy to take down your foes.
There is only a few missions to play right now, with more on the way. The few missions you do get feel pretty solid. You do things like using an enemy as a human shield, throw a magazine to distract the enemies and use your AI partner to clear rooms and secure them. I am really enjoying this game so far and can't wait for more levels.
after i have updated the game to the latest version i can no longer start the game everything is blank when in the office at the very start

developer_response.body:
Hi John,

We're pleased to inform you that a fix has been implemented to address the issue you reported. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused. Since this is a pre-release version, please be aware that there may be significant changes. This update encompasses a wide range of improvements that will be fully realized in the near future.

Your feedback is highly valued, and we've taken your input into consideration. If you have a moment, we would greatly appreciate your thoughts on the updated version.

For further updates on this matter, please refer to our channel: https://discord.gg/gGYDPZsmVN.

Thank you for your understanding and patience.

Best regards!

Hi, I'm not sure which door you're referring to, but if it's the first one, then yes, it's a lookout post for an alternative route from above. If you're still bothered by it or have any questions, you can reach me on Discord or by email.

reviews.review_description: This is a great game. But don't think you can just run and gun through it. I tried. A lot. And failed. You have to use tactics, stealth and your partner. Overall lots of fun and mechanics you don't find in other similar games. Lots of fun and definitely challenging
On level 3 on exodus you phase throu the floor
Great game, the devs work hard and listen to the players feedback, which is rare. Gameplay feels great, new things added/fixed with each update. Any fan of VR FPS games will enjoy this title.

This game is a fun game with simple yet beautiful mechanics. You do a lot of things right in this game then other game developers don’t, such as making the rooms look realistic with furniture, AI taking cover and having a fast player ttk. This game needs Multiplayer but for now it’s a perfect 5 for me and keep up the good work
